title: OpenClaw bundled runtime dependency installer trusted npm_execpath from workspace .env
description: In resolveBundledRuntimeDepsNpmRunner() the bundled runtime dependency installer reads env.npm_execpath and, when it passes a loose isNpmCliPath() shape check, uses it as the first npm CLI candidate (npmCliCandidates[0]) that is then spawned via the resolved node execPath to run `npm install` for bundled runtime deps. Because npm_execpath is an environment variable that a workspace .env can set, and that key was not on the BLOCKED_WORKSPACE_DOTENV_KEYS dotenv blocklist at the vulnerable release, a workspace .env in a repository opened by a trusted operator could override the package-manager executable path used during dependency setup, causing an unintended local package-manager executable to be invoked during install.
